name: codex-keyring
description: Native multi-account manager for Codex with quota-aware switching and smoother auto-switch failover.

interface.shortDescription: Multi-account Codex manager with quota-aware switching
interface.longDescription: Manage multiple Codex sign-ins under aliases, switch manually in one command, or auto-switch in off, balanced, or sequential modes while respecting per-alias manual-only exclusions and supported quota, rate-limit, auth-expiry, and workspace-mismatch signals without using a proxy.
defaultPrompt: List all Codex accounts that are currently registered and show which alias is active.
Switch the active Codex account to the alias I specify and explain the current account health.
